data.body: AC amendment: Document hash sources explicitly in Step 0 Prerequisites. DIFF_HASH = output of /Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra/plugins/dso/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh (already computed by REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 2, passed through). REVIEWER_HASH = from the deep-tier code-reviewer sub-agent's output in Step 4 (the same source as REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 5). AC: verify workflow documents that --expected-hash DIFF_HASH and --reviewer-hash REVIEWER_HASH are passed to record-review.sh with these specific variable names.
